title: BetterEnd Fix for NeoForge
description: A datapack that allows Better End biomes to generate properly for Sinytra Connector.
body:
## Summary
 
A fix for Sinytra Connector's bug ticket [#1331](https://github.com/Sinytra/Connector/issues/1331). 
## Why should I install? 
### If you're a **NeoForge** user who wishes to use Better End, read this. 
 
Sinytra Connector is a NeoForge mod that enables Fabric mods for NeoForge. 
 
However, it has a bug that breaks surface terrain generation in Better End biomes, causing most features—such as foliage and trees—to fail to spawn correctly.
 
Installing my datapack will fix this issue completely. 
 
## What version is this for and how to install? 
This works for 1.21.1. I recommended to use a datapack loader mod like Global Packs so it can work for all world-types, this is optional.
